name: zk-drone-rollup
description: Zero-Knowledge Circuit for Layer 2 Drone Traffic Rollup

scripts.setup: npm run setup:tau && npm run setup:phase2
scripts.setup:tau: snarkjs powersoftau new bn128 15 pot15_0000.ptau && snarkjs powersoftau contribute pot15_0000.ptau pot15_0001.ptau --name 'First contribution' -v
scripts.setup:phase2: snarkjs powersoftau prepare phase2 pot15_0001.ptau pot15_final.ptau && snarkjs groth16 setup batch_proof_js/batch_proof.r1cs pot15_final.ptau batch_proof_0000.zkey && snarkjs zkey contribute batch_proof_0000.zkey batch_proof_0001.zkey --name 'First contribution' -v && snarkjs zkey export verificationkey batch_proof_0001.zkey verification_key.json
scripts.generate-verifier: snarkjs zkey export solidityverifier batch_proof_0001.zkey Verifier.sol
